_description: 바운디드 컨텍스트별 Input Port(UseCase) 인터페이스 맵. 크로스 컨텍스트 구현 시 이 파일을 먼저 읽고, 다른 컨텍스트의 내부 코드를 직접 탐색하지 않는다.

methods: deductBalance(Long walletId, Long coinId, BigDecimal amount) → void
addBalance(Long walletId, Long coinId, BigDecimal amount) → void
lockBalance(Long walletId, Long coinId, BigDecimal amount) → void
unlockBalance(Long walletId, Long coinId, BigDecimal amount) → void
findByRoundIdAndChainAndAddress(Long roundId, String chain, String address) → Optional<DepositAddressResult>

commandDtos.CreateWalletWithBalanceCommand: roundId: Long, exchangeId: Long, baseCurrencyCoinId: Long, initialAmount: BigDecimal, createdAt: LocalDateTime
commandDtos.IssueDepositAddressCommand: walletId: Long, coinId: Long, chain: String

resultDtos.WalletResult: walletId: Long, roundId: Long, exchangeId: Long, seedAmount: BigDecimal
resultDtos.DepositAddressResult: walletId: Long, chain: String, address: String, tag: String

methods: findSellOrders(Long walletId, Long exchangeCoinId, LocalDateTime after) → List<FilledOrderResult>

commandDtos.PlaceOrderCommand: idempotencyKey: String, walletId: Long, exchangeCoinId: Long, side: Side, orderType: OrderType, price: BigDecimal, amount: BigDecimal

queryDtos.FindOrderHistoryQuery: walletId: Long, exchangeCoinId: Long, side: Side, status: OrderStatus, cursorOrderId: Long, size: int

resultDtos.OrderHistoryCursorResult: content: List<OrderHistoryResult>, nextCursor: Long, hasNext: boolean

resultDtos.FilledOrderResult: orderId: Long, walletId: Long, exchangeCoinId: Long, side: String, amount: BigDecimal, quantity: BigDecimal, filledPrice: BigDecimal, filledAt: LocalDateTime
resultDtos.ViolationResult: violationId: Long, orderId: Long, ruleId: Long, createdAt: LocalDateTime

methods: findExchangeCoinIdMap(Long exchangeId, List<Long> coinIds) → Map<Long, Long>
findByExchangeIdAndCoinIdAndChain(Long exchangeId, Long coinId, String chain) → Optional<ExchangeCoinChainResult>
findByExchangeIdAndCoinIdAndChain(Long exchangeId, Long coinId, String chain) → Optional<WithdrawalFeeResult>
